name: Dominique Gaumont
abstract: Dominique Gaumont (8 January 1953 – 10 November 1983) was a French jazz guitarist who played alongside notable musicians such as Miles Davis, the Art Ensemble of Chicago, and Michel Portal.

concerts.label: New Audiences Jazz Anthology Series: Miles Davis

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee corrects the interviewer regarding who brought Dominique Gaumont into the band, indicating awareness of his involvement but no direct personal or professional relationship described.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
